bead.title: Add wasted-cost breakdown to ddx agent metrics tier-success
bead.description: The existing tier-success command shows avg_cost_usd per tier but does not distinguish between cost that produced closed beads vs cost wasted on failed attempts. Add wasted_cost_usd and effective_cost_usd columns. This directly answers which tier wastes the most money and validates whether adaptive min-tier is working.
bead.acceptance:
1. tierSuccessRow gains two new fields: WastedCostUSD float64 (sum of cost_usd for non-success attempts) and EffectiveCostUSD float64 (sum of cost_usd for success attempts).
2. Table output includes WASTED_COST and EFFECTIVE_COST columns.
3. JSON output includes wasted_cost_usd and effective_cost_usd.
4. Unit test: 3 attempts (1 success at $1, 2 failures at $0.50 each) -> wasted=1.0, effective=1.0.
5. cd cli && go test -run TestWastedCost ./cmd && go build .
